name: File Input
description: Provides image or text file input to the workflow. For video files, use the Video Input node.
doc:
Select and load a file into the workflow.

Supported Files:
• Images (PNG, JPG, etc.) - loaded as base64
• Text files (TXT, JSON, etc.) - loaded as text
• For videos, use Video Input node instead

Output:
• Images: base64 data URL ready for AI vision
• Text: raw file content as string

Tip: Click the file picker or drag & drop a file onto the node.

outputs.name: Content
outputs.description: File content (text or base64 for images)
